ValidationRule.description: Applies to the "CC- General" Case record type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - General' ,ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed') ,ISBLANK( BD_SAP_Reference_Number__c ) ,ISBLANK( DX_Resolution__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_022: When closing a Case, you must enter either the SAP Reference Number or the Resolution
